nasb.text: Let the stars of its twilight be darkened; Let it wait for light but have none, And let it not see the breaking dawn;

esv.text: Let the stars of its dawn be dark; let it hope for light, but have none, nor see the eyelids of the morning,

cnv.text: 願那夜黎明的星星變成黑暗， 願那夜等候發光卻不亮，見不到清晨的曙光。

ccb.text: 愿那夜的晨星昏暗， 等不到晨光的出现， 看不见黎明的眼帘。
